gates.requirement: Canon facts retain source spans and the family-death reveal occurs only at the séance.
evidence: Browser route contains no family-death language before the third evidence placement.

gates.requirement: A new player learns who Grace is, why light matters and what to do before free exploration.
evidence: First HUD objective names the shutter
A/D, E and dialogue controls appear in context

gates.requirement: Core interactions change at least two consequence channels and alter navigation or world layer.
evidence: Piano exposes album and overlap layer
Album permanently enables daylight and garden

gates.requirement: The required route reaches the ending with no deadlock and retains return paths.
evidence: All five maps retain a return-to-hall route until the final action

gates.requirement: Reload restores map, flags, evidence, door sequence and player position.
evidence: Reloaded after Victor reveal; Continue restored chapter 4, nursery state, evidence and objective

gates.requirement: Every phase exposes a concrete current objective and every hotspot names a verb.
evidence: Six chapter objectives observed during route
Hotspots use 关上、确认、调谐、拿走、擦净、放置、走进

gates.requirement: The complete interaction grammar has a keyboard path and motion can be reduced.
evidence: A/D and arrows move; E interacts; Enter/Space advances; 1/2/3 tunes; M/J open tools

gates.requirement: All required stages, state variants and cast identities use one coherent visual language.
evidence: Child-room light variant preserves camera and geometry

gates.requirement: No external or actor-likeness asset enters the build without provenance.
evidence: Prompts prohibit actor likeness, text, logos and watermarks

gates.requirement: Core play requires no runtime model, secret or remote asset.
evidence: No network dependencies in build report
Browser console contains no application errors

gates.requirement: Versions 0.1 and 0.2 are independently playable on one local port.

visualEvidence.notes: No clipping; hierarchy and both version actions remain readable at 1050x900.
Dark background, actor cutouts, hotspots, objective and evidence bar remain legible.
World-layer status, piano, album and ghost actor are distinguishable.

pacingEvidence: Opening uses five player-paced lines before the first action.
Agency and performance alternate across nine consequential transactions.
The final truth is distributed over three evidence placements rather than one exposition block.
accessibilityEvidence: Hotspots have accessible names with concrete verbs.
Audio puzzle duplicates its pattern in visible text and numbered keys.
